task: Add a new isCommunityWorkout boolean field to the planned workout model. This field marks workouts created by the Amp customer community. On the iOS app, community workouts should display a unique icon/badge on the workout preview screen to distinguish them from coach-created workouts. This is a cross-repo feature: backend schema + iOS UI.
